creator: mat@FreeBSD.org
text:
The options I have are:

Options        :
        AX_DISABLE_TRAP: off
        AX_SOCKONLY    : off
        DOCS           : on
        DUMMY          : on
        IPV6           : on
        JAIL           : off
        MFD_REWRITES   : on
        MYSQL          : off
        PERL           : on
        PERL_EMBEDDED  : on
        PYTHON         : off
        SMUX           : on
        TKMIB          : off
        TLS            : off
        UNPRIVILEGED   : off


It happens on 10.3, 11.0 and 11.1.

and net-snmp-5.7.3_17.
